name: Multi Mono
explanation: An expressive single-VCO monosynth in the Multimoog lineage. One oscillator (sawtooth plus variable pulse) and a square sub run through a Moog-style resonant low-pass with its own envelope; the signature OSC MOD applies an LFO to both pitch (vibrato) and pulse-width for the lip/aftertouch-style growl and expression. Last-note mono with glide. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Osc Mod, Sub and Level.
